_instructions.description: This file contains all suggestions for the Simply Nerdy website.
_instructions.genres: Each suggestion must have a genre field. Genre names are freeform (e.g. Platformer, Sci-Fi, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Drama, Thriller, RPG, Racers, etc.).
_instructions.platformIcons: Each platform entry needs: name, url, icon (one of: steam, playstation, xbox, nintendo, pc, epic, gog, amazon, kindle, audible, apple-books, barnes-noble, netflix, hulu, disney-plus, hbo-max, prime-video, apple-tv, paramount-plus, crunchyroll, spotify, apple-music, youtube-music, tidal, blu-ray, theaters, vudu, google-play)

suggestions.title: Banjo-Kazooie
suggestions.excerpt: A timeless 3D platformer from Rare where a bear and bird duo take on a wicked witch. Vibrant worlds, unforgettable music, and pure 90s charm make this a must-play.

suggestions.title: The Way of Kings
suggestions.excerpt: Brandon Sanderson's epic fantasy masterpiece that launches the Stormlight Archive. A sweeping tale of war, honor, and ancient magic on a world battered by devastating storms.

suggestions.title: The Dark Knight
suggestions.excerpt: Christopher Nolan's genre-defining superhero film. Heath Ledger's Joker delivers one of cinema's greatest performances in this gripping tale of chaos vs. order in Gotham City.

suggestions.title: Breaking Bad
suggestions.excerpt: A high school chemistry teacher turned methamphetamine manufacturer in this gripping AMC series. Walter White's transformation remains one of television's greatest character arcs.
